label: Surgery outcome: hediff with duration
description: Surgery outcome that applies a HediffDef whose duration in days is determined by a quality-to-days curve. Used by Biotech xenogerm implantation.

hediff.label: Hediff
hediff.description: HediffDef applied to the patient when this outcome fires.

qualityToDurationDaysCurve.label: Quality to duration days curve
qualityToDurationDaysCurve.description: SimpleCurve mapping surgery quality (X) to the hediff duration in days (Y).
